name: Construction Materials and Vendors (ad-hoc)
summary: Companies providing essential construction materials and services, leveraged to infrastructure spending cycles. The thesis centers on pricing power in commoditized products (aggregates, cement), exposure to public infrastructure bills, and margin resilience against input cost volatility. Key risks include interest-rate sensitivity in residential construction and energy-intensive production economics.

relationships.note: BECN is largest distributor of Sherwin-Williams architectural paints
Vulcan Materials uses Caterpillar equipment in quarry operations
Nucor and Alcoa compete in structural building materials

valuation.erp_basis: Higher than broad market due to construction cyclicality and commodity exposure
valuation.terminal_growth_basis: Below GDP trend reflecting mature industry with limited pricing power
